title: Retry without idempotency key creates duplicate pending authorization
summary: Client timeout retry can create a second temporary authorization hold when the idempotency header is missing.

title: Redirect URI host comparison is case sensitive
summary: OAuth callback validation rejects configured hosts containing uppercase characters.

title: Java quickstart environment variable typo
summary: Java guide uses an incorrect API key environment variable name.

title: Local debug output includes personal API token
summary: A developer-only debug command prints a personal token to a local terminal.

title: Redelivery generates a new webhook delivery ID
summary: After a transient subscriber error, webhook redelivery uses a new identifier and can be processed twice.

title: Invoice export ignores tenant timezone
summary: CSV invoice timestamps are rendered in UTC instead of the configured account timezone.

title: Login 500 after authentication deployment
summary: A production authentication deployment causes login failures for all tenants until rollback.

title: Structured output sample uses legacy Chat Completions syntax
summary: Python documentation still uses the old response_format Chat Completions example instead of Responses.

title: Duplicate settlement rows in internal report
summary: An internal settlement report duplicates rows but does not affect card authorizations or customers.

title: Secret scanner reports masked token
summary: The scanner flags a correctly masked token in CI logs as a false positive.
